description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a default docker:stable image and docker:stable-dind service, a default before_script that runs apt-get update && apt-get install -y libscrypt0 python3-pip zsh and pip3 install --user --upgrade pip setuptools wheel, and global variables DOCK_NS=inbitcoin, GIT_DEPTH=3, NAME=lighter, NAME_PIP=lighter-bitcoin. Define three stages: prepare, test, and post. In the prepare stage add a source_dist job that uses the debian:buster-slim image, runs python3 setup.py sdist bdist_wheel, inherits the default before_script, triggers only on master, develop, staging, and merge_requests, and publishes the dist/ directory as an artifact. In the test stage add a test job that uses the default docker:stable image with the docker:stable-dind service, overrides before_script to empty, triggers on the same branches, sets VERSION=latest, and executes docker build -f docker/Dockerfile -t $DOCK_NS/$NAME:$VERSION ., docker build -f docker/Dockerfile.ci -t $DOCK_NS/$NAME-ci:$VERSION ., and docker run --rm -u lighter --entrypoint python3 $DOCK_NS/$NAME-ci setup.py test. In the post stage add a pypi_test job that depends on source_dist, uses the debian:buster-slim image, runs only on tags, defines PYPI_INDEX_URL, TEST_PYPI_INDEX_URL, TEST_PYPI_UPLOAD_URL, TWINE_NON_INTERACTIVE variables, and runs python3 -m pip install --user --upgrade twine, then python3 -m twine upload --repository-url "$TEST_PYPI_UPLOAD_URL" -u $TEST_PYPI_USER -p $TEST_PYPI_PASS dist/*, and finally python3 -m pip install --index-url "$TEST_PYPI_INDEX_URL" --extra-index-url "$PYPI_INDEX_URL" $NAME_PIP.
